title: vaccinium uliginosum subsp. uliginosum
intro: Vaccinium uliginosum subsp. uliginosum, also known as bog bilberry, is a subspecies of Vaccinium uliginosum, a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to Arctic and alpine regions. The medicinal properties of bog bilberry include its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of bog bilberry include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of bog bilberry include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
